# TransferIntel

> Premier League transfer rumours scored 0 to 100 for credibility, with transparent value-for-money verdicts on confirmed fees.

Window: Premier League · Summer Window 2026. Last updated: Jul 22, 2026.

## Method

Credibility scores are computed in code, not written by a model. A score rises with the tier of the outlets reporting a claim and with independent corroboration, and decays when a deal goes quiet. Only tier 1 and tier 2 outlets can advance a deal's status. A completed transfer requires a tier 1 source. Scores are an assessment of how well supported a claim is. They are not predictions and not betting advice.

## Pages

- [Window index](https://peterdsouza247.github.io/transfer-intel/): every tracked deal, funnel and club summary
